nodes.name: El Sira Communal Reserve
nodes.summary: El Sira Communal Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Sira curassow、Sira barbet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Sira barbet
nodes.summary: Sira barbet（Sira barbet，学名 Capito fitzpatricki），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Eight specimens were collected from the upper Río Shinipo and Río Tzipani valleys , and a further two at Quebrada Quirapokiari in July 2011. Its range is sympatric and syntopic with that of the gilded barbet, and coincides with the boundary and sections of the Sira Communal Reserve. It primarily inhabits the highest stratum of tall (up to ) montane forest with arboreal epiphytes and moss above a sparsely vegetated understory

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Eight specimens were collected from the upper Río Shinipo and Río Tzipani valleys , and a further two at Quebrada Quirapokiari in July 2011.
